CustomField.formula:
IF(ISPICKVAL( Calc_Unit__c , "Sheet"),
IF(Qty_Up__c <> 0, SheetQtyUpforUsed__c,
IF(ISPICKVAL( Sided__c , "Double"),(Quantity__c * of_Pages__c )/2,
Quantity__c * of_Pages__c )),
IF( AND(Qty_Up__c <> 0,ISPICKVAL( Calc_Unit__c , "Each")) , EachQtyUpforUsed__c,0))
CustomField.label: Qty Used
